response.justification: The candidate has extensive experience in software development but lacks the core C++ experience on the Windows platform required for this role. Their background is heavily skewed towards web, mobile, and embedded systems with languages like TypeScript, Node.js, D, and Java, with only brief mentions of C/C++ in academic and early career roles. No fixed income, capital markets, or investment banking domain expertise is evident.
strengths: Fluent in English and strong communication skills as evidenced by workshops and talks
Experience with SQL and databases across multiple projects
Proven ability to work in Agile and CI/CD environments
concerns: No significant hands-on C++ development on Windows platform (5-10 years as required)
No domain expertise in Fixed Income, Fixed Income Derivatives, or Investment Banking
Primary experience in web/mobile development rather than capital markets systems
